general.headline: NBFCs let it pass through as funding costs increase

Experts note that while many maintain rates, some are passing higher funding expenses to customers via increased lending rates or fees. The spread between NBFC and corporate borrowing costs has widened significantly.

general.headline: Tense Fed is set to lead global peers with interest-rate hold
general.summary: Global central banks, including the Federal Reserve, are expected to hold interest rates steady amid heightened political pressure and global economic uncertainty. Despite President Trump's calls for lower rates, officials are prioritizing policy independence. Peers in Brazil, Canada, and Sweden may also maintain current settings, reflecting a unified stance on independence.

general.headline: 'Violent' price spike rocks gas traders' bad winter bets

This surge impacts global markets, with Asian buyers potentially priced out. Tankers are rerouting to Europe. Traders are in panic mode as pipelines face freezing risks, threatening supply amid high demand.
